notes: CPU-only POC config. The account has ZERO GPU transform quota (ml.g4dn/g5/p3/inf2/trn1 = 0) but CPU quota exists (ml.m5.large = 8). This config targets a CPU SageMaker Model (sbnai-fourcastnet-fcn-v1-cpu-poc) that reuses the GPU model's model.tar.gz with a CPU PyTorch image. It is only valid if code/inference.py inside the artifact is CPU-safe (no hardcoded CUDA). Verify with scripts/inspect_and_patch_fourcastnet_inference.py before use. NOTE: content_type application/x-npy with SplitType=None feeds the whole .npy as one payload; docs/fourcastnet_batch_transform.md considers the JSONL S3-pointer manifest the canonical path. Confirm input_fn accepts x-npy.
